facts: Binary is base-2 number system using only 0 and 1
Algorithm complexity is measured in Big O notation
OOP principles: Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstraction
TCP/IP is the foundation of internet communication
SQL stands for Structured Query Language
Git is a distributed version control system
REST is an architectural style for web services
CPU executes instructions through fetch-decode-execute cycle
RAM is volatile memory that loses data when power is off
examples: Sorting algorithms: Bubble sort, Quick sort, Merge sort
Data structures: Arrays, Linked lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs
Network protocols: HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, SMTP, DNS
OS concepts: Process management, Memory management, File systems
Web technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Angular
